mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.gender, u.email, u.organization_id, o.organization_name, u.avatar_icon_id, i.component_name AS avatar_icon_name, u.system_admin, u.created_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_organization o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_icon i ON i.id = u.avatar_icon_id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.name, u.gender, u.organization_id, o.organization_name, u.email, u.avatar_icon_id, i.component_name AS avatar_icon_name, u.system_admin, u.raw_password, u.created_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_organization o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_icon i ON i.id = u.avatar_icon_id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.organization_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND u.organization_id = #{organizationId}
ORDER BY u.system_admin DESC, u.created_time ASC
